description_long: This object is a large bird with a striking white head and tail, contrasting sharply with its dark brown to black body and wings. The wings are broad and long, with prominent primary feathers that are splayed and finger-like at the tips. The beak is large, hooked, and yellow, typical of predatory raptors. The legs are featherless and yellow, ending in strong talons suited for grasping prey. The tail is relatively short and fan-shaped, with a clean white coloration. The overall appearance is majestic and powerful, evoking the image of a bird of prey often seen soaring over open landscapes or near water.
description: A large, powerful bird with a white head and tail, dark wings and body, and a hooked yellow beak. Its broad wings and fan-shaped tail are distinctive.
description_view_0: The bird is seen head-on with wings fully outstretched, showing the broad wingspan and white head.
description_view_1: Side profile reveals the hooked yellow beak, white head, and tail, with the dark body and wing feathers clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view highlights the white tail and the symmetry of the outstretched wings, with the legs and talons visible beneath the body.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile, again showing the white head and tail, hooked beak, and the detailed feather structure of the wings.
attribute_plumage_pattern: Solid dark brown body and wings with a sharply contrasting white head and tail; no spots or bars.
